description_for_human: Order ServiceNow catalog items and manage requests from Microsoft 365 Copilot.

functions.name: search_catalog_items
functions.description: Search the ServiceNow service catalog to find items the employee can order or request - such as laptops, phones, monitors, software, hardware, or access. Call this whenever the user wants to order, request, buy, get, find, or browse anything (for example 'I need a new laptop', 'order VPN access', 'what software can I request'). Pass the user's request as a natural-language query.

functions.name: get_catalog_item_form
functions.description: Get the order form for a selected ServiceNow catalog item, optionally prefilled from conversation context. Call this after the user picks an item returned by search_catalog_items.

functions.name: place_order
functions.description: Place a ServiceNow catalog order with the collected form values.

functions.name: validate_servicenow_config
functions.description: Validate ServiceNow authentication and catalog access.

functions.name: list_user_orders
functions.description: Retrieve all current (non-closed) orders for the authenticated user.

functions.name: update_order
functions.description: Update a service catalog order from the requestor's perspective. Allowed fields: short_description, description, comments, urgency, priority.

functions.name: get_order_detail
functions.description: Retrieve a single ServiceNow service catalog request (sc_request) by sys_id, including its items and approval records.

functions.name: add_to_cart
functions.description: Add a ServiceNow catalog item to the user's cart without ordering yet. Use when collecting multiple items before checkout instead of placing a single order.

functions.name: view_cart
functions.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's current ServiceNow cart contents. Renders the cart widget.

functions.name: update_cart_item
functions.description: Update a line item in the ServiceNow cart — change its quantity and/or variable values.

functions.name: remove_cart_item
functions.description: Remove a single line item from the ServiceNow cart.

functions.name: submit_cart
functions.description: Submit the entire ServiceNow cart as a single request (one REQ with multiple requested items).

functions.name: update_order_item
functions.description: Update a single requested item (line item) on an existing order — change its quantity or add a comment/description — without touching the rest of the order.

functions.name: remove_order_item
functions.description: Remove a single requested item (line item) from an existing order without cancelling the whole request.

functions.name: get_incident_form
functions.description: Open the 'report an incident' form so the user can describe a problem with IT.

functions.name: report_incident
functions.description: Report (create) a ServiceNow incident for the end user from the report form values.

functions.name: list_user_incidents
functions.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's own open and recently resolved ServiceNow incidents.

functions.name: get_incident_detail
functions.description: Retrieve a single ServiceNow incident by sys_id, including status and customer-visible comments.

functions.name: add_incident_comment
functions.description: Add a customer-visible additional comment to one of the user's ServiceNow incidents.

functions.name: add_incident_attachment
functions.description: Attach a file (e.g. a screenshot) to one of the user's ServiceNow incidents. Files are limited to 5 MB.

functions.name: remove_incident_attachment
functions.description: Remove a file previously attached to one of the user's ServiceNow incidents.
